event_title: Reactive Summit + Scale By the Bay 2020 CFP is now Open through July 31
title: Reactive Summit + Scale By the Bay 2020 CFP is now Open through July 31
description: Scale By the Bay is now following Reactive Summit, the conference of the Reactive Foundation, a Linux Foundation project focused on cloud-native applications. The 8th Annual Scale By the Bay developer conference will be held either online or in person in November, 2020. The joint CFP is now extended at https://scale.bythebay.io, until July 31. Please submit your best talk early, and hope to see you on the program!
